_meta.tester: Fresh Claude agent with zero HUF context
_meta.method: Agent read FAST_REFRESH.json only, answered 5 of 10 questions (abbreviated test)

Q01_naming.answer: Entropy-Invariant Time Transformer. NEVER: Ternary Transform, Temporal Transform, Time Transfer

Q03_japan.answer: 2013-2014. Fukushima March 2011 but annual data absorbs shock by 2013-2014. NOT 2011-2012.

Q05_governance.answer: Open-loop: HUF-GOV observes, human decides, loop stays open. Instrument reads, never actuates.

Q06_formula.answer: Flag when d_A(t→t+1) > μ+2σ. d_A(x,y) = ‖clr(x)−clr(y)‖. Country thresholds: DE 5.5634, JP 5.6909, UK 2.8008

verdict: FAST_REFRESH.json is an excellent cold-start briefing. All 5 tested questions answered with HIGH confidence from a single file read. The file is canonical, precise, and well-organized. Missing: worked examples, explicit file-routing for next steps. Companion files needed for implementation depth.
recommendations: Add a next_steps field pointing to specific files for specific tasks
Add one worked example per formula showing input → output
Otherwise the system works as designed
